text: What if your body had a memory that could save your life? After an infection or vaccine, your immune system creates memory cells. These cells, like vigilant guards, remember past invaders. Memory B cells churn out antibodies, while memory T cells seek and destroy. Together, they create a powerful defense, ready for the next attack. Wondering how long this memory lasts? Months, years, even a lifetime! Curious about your immune system? Like and follow for more science secrets!
